name: ProfileOffer
description: Profiles offered by the client, one octet per profile (handshake only).

name: ProfileSelect
description: Profile selected by the server (handshake only).

name: CertVerify
description: SignatureScheme (u16) + signature over the transcript (handshake AUTH).

name: Finished
description: Finished MAC, length = negotiated KDF-hash output (handshake AUTH).

name: AEADOffer
description: AEAD suites offered by the client (handshake only).

name: AEADSelect
description: AEAD suite selected by the server (handshake only).

name: (reserved)
description: Reserved for a companion specification (handshake only).

name: (reserved)
description: Forward-incompatible extension points (Type high bit set).
